body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) is set to become a holding bank for five regional banks, with Bank NTB Syariah reporting the most advanced progress, and expects to report exponential non-organic growth in assets and dividend received from its partners, potentially reaching IDR 165 trillion in assets. The consolidation is expected to help regional banks meet the minimum core capital requirement of IDR 3 trillion by December 2024, but also poses risks, such as non-performing loans, which BJTM must be prepared to address.
title: Bank Jatim to Establish Holding Company for Five Regional Banks, Aiming to Meet Core Capital Requirement.

body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) reported an 86% year-on-year revenue surge to IDR 186 billion in 9M 2024, driven by its B2B financial services and B2B2E Venteny Employee Super App, which contributed 40% and 32% to revenue, respectively. However, the company's net profit dropped 60.5% year-on-year to IDR 2.63 billion due to a significant increase in general administrative expenses and a decline in other income.
title: PT Venteny Fortuna International's revenue surges 86% year-on-year, but profit drops 60.5% due to increased expenses.
